text:
Qudrat
ka ajeeb yeh sitam hai
!
Insaan
ko raaz jo banaya
Raaz
uss ki nigaah se chhupaya
Be
taab hai zauq-e-aagahi ka
Khulta
nahin bhed zindagi ka
Hairat
aaghaaz-o-inteha hai
Aaeene
ke ghar mein aur kya hai
Hai
garm-e-khiraam mauj-e-darya
Darya
su-e-sehar jaada paima
Baadal
ko hawa uda rahi hai
Shaanon
pe uthaye la rahi hai
Taare
mast-e-sharaab-e-taqdeer
Zindaan
falak mein pa-ba-zanjeer
Khursheed
, woh aabid-e-sehar-khaiz
Laane
wala payaam-e-bar-khaiz
Maghrib
ki pahaadiyon mein chhup kar
Peeta
hai mai-e-shafaq ka saaghar
Lazzat
geer-e-wujood har shai
Sar
mast-e-mai-e-namood har shai
Koi
nahin gham-gusaar insaan
Kya
talkh hai rozgaar insaan
!
